sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# UP didn't move the blue bar. Let me check all objects to see what's blocking
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  {n['color']}: ({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)}), pixels={n['pixels']}, id={n['id']}")

# Check adjacency
print("\nAdjacency:")
for edge in seg['adjacency_list']:
    print(f"  {edge}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
